hero.title: Turn static manga into living video.
hero.lead: MangaShift reads the page, understands the panels, and narrates them — turning manga and manhwa into immersive video, automatically.

about.title: We give manga a voice.
about.lead: Reading is silent. MangaShift adds motion, narration and sound — so a story you scroll becomes a story you watch.

how.title: From page to video, in four steps.

steps.title: Upload
steps.text: Drop in manga or manhwa pages.

steps.title: Detect
steps.text: AI reads panels, bubbles and reading order.

steps.title: Narrate
steps.text: Text is translated and voiced naturally.

steps.title: Render
steps.text: Everything is composed into a video.

items.title: AI narration
items.text: Natural voices that match the scene.

demo.title: A page, brought to life.
demo.lead: A short look at what MangaShift produces.

proof.title: Be the first to try it.
proof.lead: MangaShift is in private beta. Join early and help shape it.

items.a: A pipeline that turns static manga and manhwa into narrated video using AI.
The beta is free. Pricing will be announced later.
We start with English; more languages are planned.
Soon. Leave your email and we'll reach out the moment it's ready.

beta.title: Be the first to try MangaShift.
beta.lead: Leave your email to join the private beta — we'll reach out the moment it's ready. No spam, just the invite.
beta.consent: I agree to be contacted by email about the beta test.
beta.successMessage: Thanks! We'll email you when the beta opens.
beta.errorMessage: Something went wrong — please try again or email us directly.
